description_short: Reduce stress, relieve anxiety and relax deeply with our weighted blanket. Filled with glass microbeads this feel-good blanket will have you snoozing peacefully in no time.

construction_layers.name: Blanket Cover
construction_layers.material: Micro Peached Fabric (Cotton Sateen mentioned in FAQ)

cover_fabric.wash_instructions: Not machine washable. Spot clean with damp cloth.

proprietary_tech.name: Deep Pressure Therapy
proprietary_tech.description: Glass bead weight reduces stress and anxiety.

faq_specs.question: Are glass beads safe? What if they break?
faq_specs.answer: The premium high density glass beads that we use are completely safe. They're made to be shatterproof.

faq_specs.question: Can I wash the Weighted Blanket?
faq_specs.answer: The fill of the Weighted Blanket is why the Weighted Blanket is not machine washable. In case of any spills, just use a damp cloth and wipe it off gently.

notes_observed: Only Single size; 4kg weight. Not washable (key constraint). Therapeutic positioning — pairs with [[pregnancy-body-pillow]] in stress-relief category.
